InstructionData.Title: Frn_ControllerScript
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
INIT: alias d_furnace d0 #Furnace actual alias d_maxtemp d1 #Dial 1 alias d_maxpress d2 #Dial 2 alias d_emervent d3 #Emergency Vent Lever alias d_dvcharge d4 #Digital Valve Charge alias d_dvexhaust d5 #Digital Valve Exhaust
alias r_maxtemp r1 alias r_maxpress r2 alias r_frntemp r3 alias r_frnpress r4 alias r_tmp r5 alias r_emervent r11 #Emergency vent
#configure charge and exhaust vents s d_dvexhaust Setting 0 s d_dvexhaust On 0 s d_dvcharge Setting 0 s d_dvcharge On 0
START: l r_emervent d_emervent Setting #load lever pos breqz r_emervent 2 #branch 2 if a=0 j EMERGVENT #goto emergency vent l r_frnpress d_furnace Pressure l r_frntemp d_furnace Temperature
CHECKPRESS: l r_maxpress d_maxpress Setting mul r_maxpress r_maxpress 100 brgt r_frnpress r_maxpress 3 #br if overpressure s d_dvexhaust On 0 # not at max pressure j CHECKTEMP # move on s d_dvexhaust On 1 # at maximum pressure j START # go back and check again
CHECKTEMP: l r_maxtemp d_maxtemp Setting mul r_maxtemp r_maxtemp 100 brgt r_frntemp r_maxtemp 4 # br if overtemp s d_dvcharge On 1 # not at max temp s d_furnace Activate 1 s d_furnace Activate 0 s d_dvcharge On 0 # close charge valve again
j START
EMERGVENT: s d_dvexhaust On 1 s d_dvcharge On 0 sleep 1 l r_emervent d_emervent Setting #load the lever pos breqz r_emervent 2 #branch 2 if a=0 j EMERGVENT j START
EOF:
